// math-server.github.io

There are more planes in the sea than submarines in the sky.

Explorations, proofs, book reviews, and many other topics for anyone who loves learning and sharing their thoughts.

Start Learning Browse Explorations
Euler's Identity \[ e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0 \]
Fundamental Theorem of Calculus \[ \int_a^b f'(x)\,\d x = f(b) - f(a) \]
Gaussian Integral \[ \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2}\,\d x = \sqrt{\pi} \]
Basel Problem \[ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^2} = \frac{\pi^2}{6} \]

Review: Basic Mathematics

Basic Mathematics by Lang claims to provide a firm foundation for a course in Calculus. The book is split into five parts: Algebra, Intuitive Geometry, Coordinate Geometry, and Miscellaneous. Algebra...
